chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-102 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No.456/2022 (U/A). 2. For orders on M.A.No.457/2022 (C/A). ------ 08.03.2022 Mr. Chanesar Khan Bihan, Advocate for the Petitioners. ------ 1. Urgency granted. 2. The petitioners by way of listed application have sought for prosecution of Province of Sindh and its officials for having failed to obey the order dated 25.09.2014, passed by this Court. No official is named. The Province of Sindh or its officials by designation could not be prosecuted for having disobeyed the order of this Court. Consequently, the listed application is dismissed accordingly. J Judge
